recent_excerpts: European Commission finds Meta violated Digital Services Act by failing to protect minors under 13 on Facebook and Instagram — risks not assessed or mitigated.
FTC reports Americans lost over $2.1 billion to social media scams in 2025 — a 10x increase since 2020. Investment and romance scams dominate losses.
Meta's bug bounty program partners with PortSwigger to provide Burp Suite licenses and training to researchers, aiming to scale high-quality vulnerability discovery across its platforms.
